docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHEFSKY, GARY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEFSKY, GARY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY BRANDER, BAT-SHEVA AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEFSKY, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-01-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEFSKY, GARY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-18-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL, APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRANDER, BAT-SHEVA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHEFSKY, GARY $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2012 - JUDGMENT.
